title: Scrolling through your impressive number of trust votes, I was struck dumbfounded to discover that my name wasn't anywhere in the list. I do take comfort in knowing that you know it had to be an honest oversight. And I'm still in a daze having discovered such a profound lapse of cognizance, as well as trying to figure out how I could've mind-sliped such an important and deserving honor for certainly the most deserving of any member on our site. Sorry 'ol buddy.
The trust cuts both ways, friend. :)
